items.description: A S D F G H J K L semicolon quote. Play white keys (C major scale from C4).
W E T Y U O P right bracket. Play black keys (sharps).
Start, pause, or resume recording (up to 30 seconds of recorded time).
Play the saved recording. Stops demo if demo is active.
Play demo melody. Press Enter again to restart it. Stops recording playback first.
Stop demo, recording playback, and active recording.
